ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Country population */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "latest_update_date" TEXT /* Date of the latest update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "same_sex_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the same-sex sexual activity record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "status" TEXT /* Legal status of same-sex sexual activity */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details regarding the status */,
  "penalty" TEXT /* Penalty for same-sex sexual activity */,
  "enforcement_status" TEXT /* Status of enforcement of the law */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_same_sex_activity_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "union_recognition" (
  "union_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the union recognition record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of recognition of same-sex unions */,
  "type_of_union" TEXT /* Type of union recognized (e.g., civil partnership, marriage) */,
  "date_recognized" TEXT /* Date when same-sex unions were recognized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("union_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_union_recognition_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "same_sex_marriage" (
  "marriage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the same-sex marriage record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "status" TEXT /* Legal status of same-sex marriage */,
  "date_legalized" TEXT /* Date when same-sex marriage was legalized */,
  "type_of_marriage" TEXT /* Type of marriage allowed (e.g., civil, religious) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marriage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_same_sex_marriage_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adoption_rights" (
  "adoption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the adoption rights record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of adoption rights for same-sex couples */,
  "type_of_adoption" TEXT /* Type of adoption allowed (e.g., joint, step-child) */,
  "date_granted" TEXT /* Date when adoption rights were granted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adoption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adoption_rights_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "military_service" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the military service record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "status" TEXT /* Eligibility status for LGB individuals */,
  "date_allowed" TEXT /* Date when LGB individuals were allowed to serve */,
  "restrictions" TEXT /* Restrictions on LGB military service (e.g., 'Don't Ask, Don't Tell' policy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_military_service_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anti_discrimination_laws" (
  "law_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the anti-discrimination law record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of anti-discrimination laws */,
  "scope" TEXT /* Scope of protection (e.g., employment, housing, public accommodations) */,
  "date_enacted" TEXT /* Date when the anti-discrimination law was enacted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("law_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anti_discrimination_laws_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gender_identity_laws" (
  "identity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the gender identity law record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of laws regarding gender identity */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details regarding the law */,
  "date_recognized" TEXT /* Date when gender identity was recognized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("identity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gender_identity_laws_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legislation_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the source record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the source of legal information */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legislation_sources_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "court_decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the court decision record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "case_name" TEXT /* Name of the court case */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date of the court decision */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the court decision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_court_decisions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_opinion" (
  "opinion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the public opinion record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "question" TEXT /* Question asked in the survey */,
  "response_rate" REAL /* Response rate of the survey */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opinion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_opinion_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violence_and_harassment" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the incident record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "type_of_incident" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., physical violence, verbal harassment) */,
  "date_occurred" TEXT /* Date when the incident occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violence_and_harassment_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hate_crimes" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the hate crime record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "type_of_crime" TEXT /* Type of hate crime (e.g., murder, assault) */,
  "date_occurred" TEXT /* Date when the hate crime occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hate crime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hate_crimes_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
